topic: AI Agent Security Tools 2026: Protecting Autonomous Agents in Production

competitors.title: AI Agent Runtime Security Tools 2026: Protecting Autonomous Agents from Threats
key_points: Runtime security monitors agent execution for malicious behavior
Tools detect prompt injection, data exfiltration, and unauthorized actions
Real-time threat detection with automated response capabilities
Integration with existing security infrastructure (SIEM, SOAR)

competitors.title: AI Agent Authentication and Access Control 2026
key_points: Role-based access control (RBAC) for AI agent permissions
Zero-trust architecture for AI agent deployments
Audit trails for all agent decisions and data accesses

competitors.title: AI Agent Governance and Compliance Security Tools 2026
key_points: Tools map AI agent activities to regulatory requirements (GDPR, HIPAA, SOC2)
Automated compliance reporting for EU AI Act and other regulations
Risk scoring and vulnerability assessment for AI agents
